code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Groupware_WikiPage] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {Groupware_WikiPage] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {Groupware_SprintBacklog] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [Groupware_KanbanBoard]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [Groupware_IssueTracker]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [Groupware_IssueTracker]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为熔断器模式画一个状态图。核心是有三个状态：正常关闭状态、熔断打开状态，还有一个半开探测状态。起点应该是WikiPage，代表系统初始的正常文档状态。
明白，三个主状态。我注意到CLOSED状态下有个Normal子状态，里面要处理IncrementFailures和CheckThreshold这些内部流转。当失败次数达到阈值时，是不是要跳转到SprintBacklog代表的OPEN状态？
对，阈值设为3次。CheckThreshold判断count等于3时就触发状态迁移。另外别忘了成功路径——execute_trade成功时要走ResetCount把计数归零。
好的，CLOSED部分我画好了，绿色填充。现在处理OPEN状态：所有调用都被BlockCalls拦截，抛出CircuitBreakerError。这里需要个60秒超时检查，用CheckTimeout来判断。
超时后进入半开状态，这个用KanbanBoard来承载。HALF_OPEN的关键是只允许一次TestRecovery探测调用，然后根据EvaluateResult决定走向。
探测成功的话回到CLOSED，失败则重新打开。但EvaluateResult有两个出口：成功到IssueTracker然后回CLOSED，失败的话有个ReOpen中间状态再到IssueTracker？
ReOpen的流向不对，应该是ReOpen直接回到OPEN状态，不是到IssueTracker。IssueTracker只接收成功的结果。让我修正：EvaluateResult失败时走ReOpen返回OPEN，成功时直接到IssueTracker并触发HALF_OPEN到CLOSED的迁移。
已修正，ReOpen现在正确指向OPEN。颜色我也按风险级别设置好了：CLOSED绿色、OPEN红色、HALF_OPEN黄色。整个熔断器状态流转应该完整了。
